mnemonics.title: Metric Categories
mnemonics.content: O.E.E.B. - Operational, Efficiency, Effectiveness, Business. Think of it as the order you measure: First, you see what's happening (Operational), then how fast you're doing it (Efficiency), then how well you're doing it (Effectiveness), and finally, what it's worth (Business).

mnemonics.title: Efficiency Metrics
mnemonics.content: The Three T's of Time: Time to Detect (MTTD), Time to Ack (MTTA), Time to Respond (MTTR). This helps remember the core time-based efficiency metrics.
